rules.trigger_condition: Hold while above 220; prepare close if below 220; close if below 210.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required before recording an executed close
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not change 220/210 lines without a new sync block or explicit user instruction.

rules.trigger_condition: No buy unless BTC stabilizes above 75,500-76,000.
rules.intended_action: 300 USDT first buyback after 75,500 stability; another 300 USDT after 76,000 confirmation
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: manual confirmation and order evidence required
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not buy BTC below the stabilization zone.

rules.trigger_condition: Continue above 35%; alert below 35%; prepare closure near 31.5%; close below 30%; lock profit if total return reaches 40%-42%+.
rules.trigger_level: 35 soft warning, 31.5 prepare close, 30 hard close, 40-42 profit surge lock zone
rules.intended_action: protect floating profit and close if protection rule triggers
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: bot closure and auto-sell evidence required before marking closed
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Profit-protection thresholds must remain explicit after bot closure.

rules.trigger_condition: Do not add GOOG or GGLL while GOOG remains below 380.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: new add orders require explicit user-provided order evidence
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not reframe weakness as add opportunity without a new decision.

rules.trigger_condition: Do not add while below 118-120; consider cleanup if it cannot recover.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required for cleanup recording
rules.rule_drift_prevention: No add unless recovery condition is met.

rules.trigger_condition: Do not add GLD or UGL; monitor GLD 405 as risk line.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: manual review required before any action
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not add gold exposure during cleanup phase.
Separate strong hold logic from weak-position cleanup.
